column2: Record: 5-11-0, Finished 4th in NFC East Division...W 22-17 at San Francisco 49ers;  L 23-13 vs Washington Redskins; W 13-10 at Denver Broncos;  L 14-11 vs St. Louis Cardinals; W 28-24 at Atlanta Falcons; W 17-13 at New York Giants; Oct 16 L 37-7 at Dallas Cowboys; L 7-6 vs Chicago Bears; L 22-21 vs Baltimore Colts; L 27-20 vs Dallas Cowboys; L 17-14 at Chicago Bears; Nov 20 L 23-0 vs New York Giants;  L 28-24 at Washington Redskins; W 13-9 vs Los Angeles Rams; L 20-17 vs New Orleans Saints (OT);  L 31-7 at St. Louis Cardinals.
